audit_items.proof_trace: safeTransferFrom at L453 uses OpenZeppelin SafeERC20 (imported at L17, bound via `using SafeERC20 for IERC20` at L25) which always reverts on failure — both on downstream EVM reverts and on ERC20 false returns. There is no try/catch around L453, so any revert propagates up and the EVM rolls back all state changes in the transaction atomically, including the safeTransfer at L444.
